name: Urgent 'Mushroom' Investigation
Description:
I've heard news of a rare and specific kind of 'mushroom' growing in the forest right now, and desperately need an assistant to help me collect them for analysis.
Meet me at the disclosed private and secluded location marked in your grimoire upon accepting this quest.

This is in no way a cover up for something else. - Elly

EventText.NameOfScene: EventStart
theScene: After trekking through the forest you finally reach the small, secluded clearing, the soothing moonlight filtering down through the trees in a rather serene sight.
After trekking through the forest you finally reach the small, secluded clearing, the warm sunshine filtering down through the trees in a rather serene sight.

Elly is sitting over by a tree, idly reading a book, with a basket filled to the brim with mushrooms next to her, but she takes note of you, standing up at your approach, gently closing her book, and brushes her robes clean.
There you are, [ThePlayerName]. As you may have surmised by the full basket filled with local mushrooms, I have not, in fact, called you out here to assist me in collecting rare fungus.
Elly gives you a serious look as she adjusts her glasses, a tension slowly building in the air as she addresses you.
The real reason I wanted you here is for an entirely different quest, one that must remain under the table so to speak. As it is highly... {i}questionable.{/i}
In truth I'm unsure if I am merely being superfluously wary on the matter... But I can't help but be unsettled by my suspicions nonetheless...
You stare at her, a little lost on what she's talking about, and she seems to take notice.

Ah! Yes, I suppose I should clarify what I actually need you to investigate. I need you to enter and inspect a confectionary called 'Bon Bon Bun' located nearby. I would tell you more, as the store itself is not what has me concerned, it's the potential {i}intent{/i} behind the store, and its owner.

But I sadly can't have you going in with pre-emptive knowledge, that could easily raise suspicion if you already know something about the proprietress. So while it {i}is{/i} risky, I need you to go in effectively blind. Thankfully I simply need you to enter the store and find out if the owner is up to anything sinister. But any and all information on the store's operation will help, so be sure to look into as much as you can.

Additionally, you can't go in there and try to fight her as a means of interrogation, as the business may be completely legitimate, and you could very well be tried with crimes for harassing her store. So the utmost caution will be needed in your efforts. We also don't want her to get suspicious of your investigation either, so act like a normal patron of her establishment.

Of course I will compensate you for your investigation. As well as funding for the investigation itself, as you will need to make some on the job purchases. For example, I'll need some of the candy for testing purposes to ensure it's not dangerous to consume in some way.

But if you choose, you can disregard this secret investigation offer entirely. This 'quest' is completely unrelated to guild duties, and you're not obligated to continue in any way. Ah, speaking of which...
Elly reaches into her robes and passes you a small bag of eros.

There's your compensation for the 'mushroom collection' quest. I hope you find it satisfactory for effectively just taking a walk in the forest. It should also be substantial enough for funding the initial efforts for investigation itself.

The shop in question is just over that way. So I'm going to simply leave this mildly illicit job offer on the table, you can completely disregard this meeting entirely if you wish. I will fully deny any claims that this ever happened in public. But I'll let you into the guild at night should you have anything to discuss with me on the matter, I will also give you your payment at the time in exchange for any intel.
Elly picks up the basket of mushrooms off the ground and adjusts her glasses in a somewhat overdramatic display and a serious gaze.

Just to reiterate the mission, I need you to find out any information you can about the store, it's owner, and any potential ill intents they might have, in addition to purchasing some candy samples for me to examine. Keep in mind to not raise suspicion, and do not attack the owner, only fight her if she attacks you first. The legal repercussions would be catastrophic for you if there's nothing sinister about her store to be found.
Additionally, the grimoire will also keep the location marked so you can easily return to the store, so you should have no issue getting here to investigate.

With a curt nod Elly walks out of the clearing, most likely heading back to town with her basket full of mushrooms, while you wonder what course of action to take. You think you can spot the store through the trees from here...

EventText.NameOfScene: Return to town.
theScene: You head back to town, wondering if you'll come back to investigate later.

EventText.NameOfScene: Go and investigate.
Confront Venefica.
theScene: Elly sets you with a serious gaze, her glasses shining slightly as she adjusts them.
Are you sure you're ready? There might be more information we can gather. There's no telling how dangerous this could be either...

EventText.NameOfScene: Yes I'm sure.
theScene: Alright. Let's get going then. I think she should be heading out tonight, so if we're quick we can catch her.
Or- uh- I misjudged it and we will be staking out there for hours for nothing.
But I am quite certain I am correct!
Elly then quickly packs up a few things and hurries the both of you out of the guild hall, carefully locking the door once you're both outside.

Then in the dead of night you trek out of town, off towards the distant caverns, Elly's grimoire and knowhow providing you both a rather smooth traversal despite her refusing to use any 'checkpoint' stones for warping you there.

EventText.NameOfScene: Not yet.
theScene: Alright. It's better to be safe than sorry.

EventText.NameOfScene: ReportMenu
CheckConfrontOption
CanConfront
theScene: Elly lets out a slow thoughtful sigh that gives you pause for a moment.
Alright... With the amount of intel I've gotten so far. We should be able to confront Venefica now.

While you've been getting intel on her, I've done my best to track her movements the scant times she does leave her home. And she often goes into the caverns beneath the mountains for some yet to be fully discerned reason.
Which is a perfect, out of the way location for us to intercept her personally and get to the bottom of her intentions. One way or the other. It's likely this could get messy.

But only tell me you're ready to go when you think you've gotten everything you can as evidence for me, every little bit is going to help me figure out how to deal with whatever she's up to, as well as potential counter measures to whatever she might throw at us. So only tell me when you're absolutely sure you're ready.
Of course, I fully believe there's more for you to uncover as it is right now. I'm just letting you know we can confront her anytime we're ready with what we have.

EventText.NameOfScene: ReportMenuReal
theScene: Report on Venefica and her business.
Tell Elly about the job offer.
Report on your time working for Venefica.

EventText.NameOfScene: That's everything for now.
theScene: So, is that everything? Or did you need to talk about something else?

EventText.NameOfScene: Report on something else...
Report about the candy.
CheckSamples
AdvSample

theScene: Elly thoughtfully clears her throat before you bring up anything else.
Thank you for acquiring all of those confections and candies for me to look into [ThePlayerName].

After taking the time to thoroughly study them. I can conclude that they are, {i}almost,{/i} entirely safe to eat. This likely extends to all of the confections in Venefica's establishment. Additionally, I can confirm, they are delicious.

I should clarify what I mean by 'almost' safe. As they actually are safe, there's just a small strange... Element involved, an odd tinge of demonic energy applied to them, even the conventionally baked confections, are notably different than the ones intentionally made with demonic energy.
But that small speck of oddness is so... infinitesimal it's incredibly hard to even notice it, let alone for it to have an effect.

You would need to have {i}so many{/i} candies and confections, you would likely die from the sheer amount before that demonic energy would cause some kind of negative effect, such as monstrification, or other oddities.

So I can only conclude that this is linked to the spot on her soul as mentioned in her diary... And is great cause for concern. As it's highly unlikely she can even notice the difference with her own immense demonic energy concentration... I have a bad feeling about all this, I urge you to hurry your investigation before some kind of disaster strikes.

So I can only conclude she's still working on perfecting whatever ill intent this demonic energy is trying to achieve. If anything this just proves we're on the right track. We just need to dig deeper to find out her intent and methods here, before disaster strikes.
Elly then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Here is your bonus for acquiring one of each of her floor stock for me to study. I hope it can aid you in furthering the investigation.

EventText.NameOfScene: Report about the candy.Menu
theScene: She produces all the candy alone, and uses magic to ease the process.
Report in on the erotic candies.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give Elly a candy sample.
theScene: Oh? You have some samples for me to check?

theScene: That's all the samples for now.

EventText.NameOfScene: That's all the samples for now.
Give her a Bag of Gummi Slimes. (Given.)
theScene: Well, you've already gotten me some of these for testing prior. But I suppose more won't hurt.
Give her a Bag of Gummi Slimes.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Bag of Gummi Slimes.
theScene: Elly gingerly takes the bag of gummies from you, setting it down on the table with an analytical look, and gently opens the bag to pick out a single candy to bring up and examine.
Hmmm... Well at a glance nothing seems wrong about them... And I don't detect any magic in them. So it's likely made through natural means.
Given the variety of colors I can also guess each is a different flavor. But that's not what's important.
She pops the single gummy into her mouth and carefully chews it for a few moments.
Hmmm... well, I'm not dying from poison. And the taste is actually rather nice.
She gulps down the candy and carefully closes the bag.
I'll have to do a more in-depth analysis of these later in my work room.
Elly stows the bag away before giving you a smile.
Thank you for your hard work [ThePlayerName].
She then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Here are some funds to aid you in your efforts to uncover any wrong doings she may be up to. I'd recommend using it to acquire the more expensive candies from Venefica's confectionary.
So, do you have anything else to report back on?

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Box of Assorted Deluxe Chocolates. (Given.)
theScene: Well, you've already gotten me some of these for testing prior. But I suppose more won't hurt.
Give her a Box of Assorted Deluxe Chocolates.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Box of Assorted Deluxe Chocolates.
theScene: Elly takes the box of chocolates from you carefully with both of her hands, and gently sets it down on the table, slowly taking off the lid, eventually revealing the collection of chocolates hiding inside.
Hm... They look normal enough... But there are faint traces of magic. Nothing that should do anything strange though... But there could be poison of some kind... Good thing I'm prepared.
She takes a moment to pull out an assortment of antidotal and healing potions, setting them on the table next to the box of chocolates.

With that set up, Elly tentatively picks up one of the chocolates between her thumb and index finger. After a moment of looking at it, she opens her mouth and tosses the chocolate inside, chewing it thoughtfully while letting out a noise of satisfaction.
Then much to your immediate concern Elly gags and chokes with a look of disgust on her face, but she merely shakes her head and points to the chocolate guide that was in the lid of the box.
Ghk- I should have- Read the guide first, Hm- this one is- so gross- t-to me-

She hastily gulps it down with a nauseated shudder before hastily getting up to go grab a glass of water to chug down, letting you take a moment to peer over the guide to see she grabbed a coconut and vanilla filled chocolate.
Egh- That was- {i}awful{/i}... I'll need to be more careful...
She then lets out a sigh and carefully puts the lid back on the box of chocolates before stowing it away for later.
I'll take a deeper look into their make up in my workshop later. Thank you for getting these [ThePlayerName].
She then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Here are some funds for acquiring more samples for analysis. Be sure to use them well.
So, do you have anything else to report back on?

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her an Alraune Nectar Glazed Donut. (Given.)
theScene: Well, you've already gotten me one of these for testing prior. But I suppose another won't hurt.
Give her an Alraune Nectar Glazed Donut.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her an Alraune Nectar Glazed Donut.
theScene: Elly tentatively takes the donut from you with her fingers.
She sighs and starts intently looking the circular confection over.
Hmmm... But it does appear to be a normal donut... Though you said it was glazed with alraune nectar...
She takes a small bite from it and hums with surprise.
Oh my, this is so sweet...
She shivers slightly with a light blush forming on her face.
Ah- There's the side effect of alraune nectar, as expected.
But regardless, this is quite the impressive donut.
She then pulls out a napkin with her free hand and sets the confection down on it, wiping her now sticky hand on the edges.
I'll need to check this more seriously in my room, but at a glance this one seems like any other kind of cuisine with alraune nectar.
Elly then pushes the donut and napkin off to the side of the table.
Thank you [ThePlayerName], I'll be sure to carefully study this acquisition.
She then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Here is more eros to help you get more samples for testing, I hope it's sufficient.
So, do you have anything else to report back on?

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Jumbo Mint Choco Chip Clarity Cookie. (Given.)
theScene: Well, you've already gotten me one of these for testing prior. But I suppose another won't hurt.
Give her a Jumbo Mint Choco Chip Clarity Cookie.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Jumbo Mint Choco Chip Clarity Cookie.
theScene: Jumbo Mint Choco Chip Clarity Cookie
Elly takes the large cookie from you with a serious look, but at the same time seems a little transfixed.
She then starts turning it over, glancing across it with a keen gaze.
Hmmm, no magic seems to be lingering in this one... I think...
She then takes a sizable bite from the cookie and lets out a satisfied noise as she chews it, pulling out a few napkins to set the large confection on as she eats her one bite.
Oh- {i}Hm,{/i} this is really good... The clarity part of it's name is also quite apt. Hmmm... Maybe I'll start picking these up once in a while, provided Venefica is actually clean of any misdoings.
You inform her how much it cost.
Okay then... Maybe just on occasion as a treat...
She then clears her throat and adjusts her glasses, giving you a serious gaze.
I'll check into researching this more thoroughly in my workshop, thank you very much for bringing it to my attention.
She then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Well, I hope this is sufficient for further sample acquisition. I can't spend too much of my budget. Sorry...
So, do you have anything else to report back on?

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Sinfully Divine Chocolate Truffle. (Given.)
theScene: Ah! Another of these! Thank you very much.
Give her a Sinfully Divine Chocolate Truffle.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give her a Sinfully Divine Chocolate Truffle.
theScene: Elly takes the single truffle from you with a slightly chiding laugh.
Oh, were they so good that you only had one left from the box?
You explain to her that they only came in single pieces, and each cost 10k eros.
As seriously as you can, you shake your head and tell her you're not bluffing.
Hm, then when I taste test it I'll have to just eat half of it and save the other for experimentation. But first.
She starts looking it over in her hand as keenly as she can.
Well, this is clearly expertly crafted, and brimming with carefully laden magic. But there's no way it's worth the price... Putting aside any negative effects this thing could instill.
She carefully takes a bite of the truffle, keeping the other half cradled in her hand, and immediately shivers in delight as it hits her tongue.
Elly sighs in delight as she finishes the melty chocolate truffle. Then much to your surprise tosses the other half she was holding in her palm into her mouth and repeats her indulgent experience.
She glances over at you with a curious look as she finishes the rest of the truffle.
What? I still have the other half-
She looks down at her now vacant palm for a moment as her brain catches up with what she just did.
{i}OH NO!{/i} I needed that- Why did I- Ugghhh-!
She plants her face on the table with an audible thud.
She slowly lifts herself up with a sigh.
On the plus side, I think I got all I needed to know about that from the mere act of eating it...
So, it's not a total loss... Oh! And, thank you very much for getting it for me to... study...
She then hands you a sizable pouch of Eros.
This most certainly doesn't cover the expense of that purchase, but I hope this aids in recouping the cost for you.
Ah- Well, do you have anything else to report back on?

EventText.NameOfScene: She produces all the candy alone, and uses magic to ease the process.
theScene: Elly gives you an appraising nod as she listens to your explanation of how Venefica makes most of the candy herself, using some magic to automate stirring and other monotonous processes.
You also tell her Venefica mentioned that most of her ingredients are grown or made on site. With the low foot traffic she gets, it's easier for her to keep stocked up and in top quality.

Hmm, hmm... I would presume that she would use magic to automate more than that... But I suppose she might enjoy her craft... If possible, get a look at the back rooms for me. The cauldrons could hold some details...

But more importantly, if most of her ingredients are made on site, checking out her garden, or other sources of ingredients in her home, could be an ideal way to get some direct samples or information. She might even be using dangerous or illicit plants in her confections.
Though I must admit, it's rather impressive how self-sufficient her business sounds.
Elly tosses you a small pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: She sells highly erotic candy.
theScene: Yes! I heard and saw some minor snippets about that. But she refused to go into detail on them with me, as our conversing had already started to go... poorly.

There's all kinds of strange effects she could apply to them, as well as ill intents behind them. Let me know if you've found out anything specific. You shouldn't {i}need{/i} to try them yourself though. But a first hand experience could help with the details.

EventText.NameOfScene: Report in on the erotic candies.
theScene: So what did you find out on her 'adult' confections?

EventText.NameOfScene: That's all I know for now.
Talk about another lewd confection.

EventText.NameOfScene: Go over Venefica's personal overview of her lewd confections.
theScene: Elly pays full attention to you as you do your best to relay all the details Venefica has told you on the whys, and how's of her more erotic inventory.
Venefica ensures they're completely separate from the normal stock for safety reasons, given she sells them for the intents of private use, a means of seduction, self pleasure, or romantic enjoyment.

Elly's interest perks up a bit more as you start to go over Venefica's interest in the actual magical and alchemical creation of these chocolates. Noting the great efforts she goes to, to have flavors and effects work perfectly, and how candy to candy the creation process can apparently vastly differ.

Said experimenting and intensive processes are why they can cost an obscene fortune, but the outcome is also highly sought after. She was also extremely vehement at the idea of them being 'addictive'. As well as very disdainful of people using them as love potions, such as elves. She also doesn't offer to teach her methods or magic, she was {i}very{/i} serious there.
Elly nods as you finish your explanation, taking a moment to digest it all with a thoughtful look on her face.

Hmmm, if nothing else she is clearly dedicated to her craft. While there may be some ulterior motive in all this, I can tell she's passionate, and not taking small measures when it comes to people's general safety.
I would be lying if I said trying to enchant food in such a way wasn't an interesting prospect given the balancing you would need to do.
However it does also explain why she was so opposed to potentially talking about magic with me. Maybe I should send her a clarifying letter of apology in that regard...
But that aside, this is very valuable intel for moving forward with.
I'm sure it's hard, but be sure to keep it up. You're doing great.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: Report in on the erotic candy sampler experience.
theScene: Elly gives you her full attention as you start to detail your experience through the lewd half of the candy sampler, doing your best to describe the menagerie of chocolates and candies you went through along with how they affected you.
She pays little heed to eroticism at play, mulling over your words with a serious gaze.

Hm, she really has quite the selection... She must have poured months of effort into these... Additionally her lactation sounds like it could be a potential concern given her nature as a witch... But I doubt she's using her own milk to mass produce candy, that's too inefficient...
Her confection's ability to invoke such melty pleasure into the consumer to such a degree is... honestly very disconcerting.
However, you also don't seem like a shivering addict to me, so I think I can safely cross that off the list of potential threats for good.
But regardless, I'll be sure to see if I can figure out a counter measure to them, or see if I can unveil anything with all this data you've given me.
Great job taking such efforts to look into this personally. I'm sure it was very arduous for you to take such a dangerous plunge.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: Tell her about the 'Mind Melting Caramel'.
theScene: Elly stares at you intently as you give her the description of the caramel and it's intended effects.
Hmmm... A candy that drains away intellect in a pleasurable manner... That is terrifying.

But... 'stir up your brain with her tongue'? That sounds like nonsense. Although, I suppose she could have some magic to simulate the effect? Or maybe ear licking with the candy's effects results in the sensation?
Thank you for this information, I'll be sure to make use of it.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: CaramelExplainMenu
theScene: Explain your experience with the 'Mind Melting Caramel'.

EventText.NameOfScene: Explain your experience with the 'Mind Melting Caramel'.
theScene: Ah, so you decided to take the chance and try them. I hope you understood how dangerous it was to do so. But please, don't leave out any details.

You nod and start to explain in full on your experience with the caramel, at least as best you can with how they basically melted your brain into a gooey puddle of bliss, all your thoughts vanishing before you could even think them, while Venefica was there gently guiding you through it.
Hmm... It's interesting that she's giving you such personal attention for these 'trial courses'... Also these effects sound horrifying. To me I mean. It sounds like you very much enjoyed yourself.
You then continue to explain the part where Venefica 'ate' your brain with her tongue. Recalling it quite clearly despite your mind being mushy bliss.
Ahhh, so it {i}was{/i} magic. At least by the sounds of it. Then with all your thoughts left in a intoxicated mess, she told you to cum over and over, until you did? Interesting...
Elly takes a moment to think and digest your explanation of what you went through.
Hmm... Thank you for sharing this experience, I'll need to keep it in mind moving forward with my theories and evidence collection.
I can't repay you the full amount for the course your went through, but this should still help you out with further investigation.
Elly tosses you a hefty pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: Tell her about the 'Indulgent Foot Fetish Gummies'.
theScene: You tell Elly about the fetish gummies and she gives you an appraising stare.
Hmmm... Fetish inducing candy... That sounds disconcerting. I'm a little surprised she only figured out how to get them to work for feet so far though.
Though it's possible it's a placebo, given it's unlikely someone without the fetish the gummi provides would willingly take it? But it's possible this could be weaponized by her or others...
As an added note, it's not shocking that most if not all of her candy won't affect her as she said. It's also unsurprising that she has testers off site.
Thank you for this information, I'll take it into account in this investigation.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: FetishExplainMenu
theScene: Explain your experience with the 'Indulgent Foot Fetish Gummies'.

EventText.NameOfScene: Explain your experience with the 'Indulgent Foot Fetish Gummies'.
theScene: Elly hums with interest as you start to explain you experience with the fetish inducing gummies, and how Venefica's feet and heels drew in every bit of your attention.
Hmm... So they do sound like they actually invoke the fetish in you... I wonder how she managed such an effect... Even more so interesting that it wasn't just her feet directly but also her heels.
You can't help but flush as you continue to recall the experience, how she stepped on you, and brought you to an intense brain melting orgasm with her feet.
It's interesting how one on one she was with you though... She doesn't seem like the type to do that...

In a surprisingly smooth motion, Elly presses one of her shoes against the back of the other and frees that foot, lifting it high into the air in front of you, making her long robes reveal most of her smooth bare legs.

And you find your legs shaking for a moment as you find yourself totally captivated by the sight, soon falling to your knees in a horny, melty daze, thoughts of Elly's single foot clouding out everything else while your cock strains and twitches against your pants.
And you have to suppress a gasp of desire as you find your eyes instantly drawn to her foot as she keeps in up in the air, and your cock already straining against your pants at the sight.
And you find your eyes instantly drawn to her foot as she keeps in up in the air, and before you realize it your cock is starting to strain in your pants.
And you merely give her a mildly baffled stare at her sudden forwardness.
Elly hums as she fixes her clothes, firmly putting her foot back in her shoe, and you snap back to your senses, standing back up with no small bit of embarrassment.
Elly hums as she fixes her clothes, firmly putting her foot back in her shoe.
Well it seems like the gummi may have had some lasting effects on you. That or you already had such a fetishistic fixation.
Well, it doesn't seem like it had any permanent effects on you...
Good work looking into this. It's been very informative.
Elly tosses you a hefty pouch of eros.
That should hopefully cover the price you paid to get this intel.

EventText.NameOfScene: Tell her about the 'Passionate Choco Sweetheart Honeymoon Deluxe Box'.
theScene: Elly gives you her rapt attention as you relay the description of the romantically inclined chocolate set, and how it invokes feelings of love in the consumers, as well as the restrictions and price increase Venefica had to place on its sales with how some of the elves were trying to use it.
Interesting... Although that really just sounds like a more convoluted charm spell? I suppose the act of sharing these chocolates with someone is intended to be a romantic act in itself?
Hmm... With such restrictions on it, as well as her anger at the elves, I severely doubt that her intent is ill with these... But be sure to not let your guard down around her regardless.
I think this intel should be useful, good work.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: SweetheartExplainMenu
theScene: Explain your experience with the 'Passionate Choco Sweetheart Honeymoon Deluxe Box'.

EventText.NameOfScene: Explain your experience with the 'Passionate Choco Sweetheart Honeymoon Deluxe Box'.
theScene: You start going over how your experience with the chocolates went, but Elly interrupts you near the start.
Venefica wouldn't have offered the trial if she didn't think you were cute... Interesting... Ah! Please, continue.

With her interjection out of the way you resume explaining how the chocolates flooded you with a pink hazy daze of intoxicating infatuation, and all your focus narrowed on Venefica. As well as how intimate she got with you.

Hmm... So, it's a few measures more intense than a basic charm spell, probably a few different kinds layered over each other... Not too shocking this lead to you both having sex, but it's strange that this one specifically would affect her as well... I doubt she's faking it.
Then you both stopped before things got too intense? I'm surprised either of you had the self control for that with that candy's effects at play... Perhaps it's not as potent as I think it is.
Thank you for sharing this information, I'm sure it will be a great aid in this investigation. This won't be enough to pay back the total price you paid, but it should help.
Elly tosses you a hefty pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: KeptGoing
theScene: You then continue to explain what happened as the two of you kept going, how Venefica eventually lost all control, pinned you down and rode you relentlessly, over and over until you passed out. How she apologized for her overbearing behavior afterwards.

Hmm... Interesting... Given she's at least part bunny girl that does make sense... But with her changes from being a witch it sounds like she becomes much more predatory when having sex once she's worked up... I wonder...
Elly is lost in thought for a moment before looking back to you.

That aside, it's interesting that prior you both had the clearness of mind to think about stopping at all prior to her losing control of her libido... I doubt that candy is as potent as I suspected initially. But more importantly this was quite informative about her behavior. Good work.
Thank you for sharing this information, I'm sure it will be a great aid in this investigation. This won't be enough to pay back the total price you paid, but it should help.
Elly tosses you a hefty pouch of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: Report on Venefica and her business.
theScene: About her being the Queen of Witches...
It seems like a passion project? She likes candy.
She seems to live so remotely to avoid people.
She uses a book to track her customers?

EventText.NameOfScene: About her being the Queen of Witches...
theScene: Elly gives you a quizzical look and adjusts her glasses.

You go on to relay what Venefica explained to you, her disdain of having that title practically forced upon her, and how she was mostly given it by witches looking to be taught by her. In addition to her want to merely be left alone to her own devices and interests.
Elly stares at you for a few long moments in silence.
{i}What!{/i} Sh-She has to be bluffing! It has to be some kind of misleading ruse!
R-Right? O-Or I may have uhm, really, {i}really{/i} messed up my introduction with her... a lot...
Elly grumbles a bit as the gears turn as you throw her a few details, such as Venefica seeming genuinely angry about the whole thing.
If that's true, it puts an entirely different perspective on the Umbral Coven... As well as Venefica's own motives and actions.
But in any case, I'm going to need some more time to process this information...
Report on Venefica and her business.
Good work double checking into that for me [ThePlayerName]. It could be vital to this investigation.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.
Report on Venefica and her business.

EventText.NameOfScene: It seems like a passion project? She likes candy.
theScene: You explain to Elly that Venefica seems to really like candy and confections, which is the apparent reason she started her business. Apparently liking both eating, and creating them.

She listens raptly as you speak, and you explain she's apparently not doing it for profit either, and more for fun. Given it's small scale. Though despite that she's also apparently backed up for orders almost constantly.
Hmmm... Her reasons for starting it could easily be a cover up... But it's possible she's not lying. Though it could still very well be part of some long term scheme.
While this doesn't unveil much, it was still insightful.
Report on Venefica and her business.
Elly tosses you a small pouch of eros.
Report on Venefica and her business.

EventText.NameOfScene: She seems to live so remotely to avoid people.
theScene: You do your best to regale Elly with Venefica's disdain for being near other people, hence the remoteness of her business, listing off: witches pestering her for education, bad customers, nosey competitors, just to name a few examples. She also seems to dislike the 'noise' of crowds.

Elly nods thoughtfully as you continue, soaking in the information, leaving you unhindered to tell her Venefica clearly understands that people don't really like her either, and generally fear her. But she did also try to be clear that she doesn't hate {i}everyone{/i}, she has some friends here and there, employees, and customers she doesn't dislike.
I see... While her remoteness could also be just to keep her evil-doing away from prying eyes. I can very much understand those issues. But it could also be a two birds with one stone situation.

However the mention of witches does bring to mind one of my interactions with her, I believe she may have gotten the wrong idea then when I asked if she wanted to trade notes. The entirely wrong idea... Especially if she's not the type to want to share anything when it comes to magical research, which is likely.
Keep in mind I was merely trying to use it as a means to look into her activities, not befriend her. So, she wasn't completely wrong to brush me off on it...
This information should be useful for compiling evidence though. Good work.
Report on Venefica and her business.
Elly tosses you a small pouch of eros.
Report on Venefica and her business.

EventText.NameOfScene: She uses a book to track her customers?
theScene: Ah, yes, I noticed that she marks peoples names and information inside as well. She most likely does it to track buying habits. But it's possible there's a more nefarious purpose behind it.
I doubt she'd be willing to let you look at it regardless of the situation... But if you could somehow get a look inside it, we might get a wealth of information on her.
Orrrrr we could end up horribly breaking some peoples privacy...
But I won't be able to rest well on this until we've looked into every thing we can.
Report on Venefica and her business.
You can have this for your troubles.
Elly tosses you a tiny pouch of eros.
Report on Venefica and her business.

EventText.NameOfScene: I touched Venefica's bunny ears.

{i}What does that have to do with investigation?!{/i}
In addition, you spent money to do this?! How much?
Elly then lets out an exasperated sigh to calm herself down.

Ah- I'm sorry for snapping at you [ThePlayerName]. You reminded me of my sister for a moment. ...Perhaps Venefica is trying to start some kind of... ear fluff addiction business... It's very unlikely.
But I would still highly recommend you refrain from touching her ears in the future, just in case.
Report on Venefica and her business.
But before you ask, {i}no!{/i} I am not going to reimburse you money for such a foolish expense!
Report on Venefica and her business.

EventText.NameOfScene: Tell Elly about the job offer.
theScene: You nod and explain that the job entails getting your semen milked as both a source of ingredients for specific confections, as well as a source of energy for Venefica. And treated like a paid pet.
She adjusts her glasses one more time before letting her hand fall to her side.

My potential suspicions aside, I recommend you take this job offer from her, but do so very carefully. It could be part of whatever scheme she may have, but it's also an excellent chance to get details on her operation, possibly even some direct samples from her candy ingredients. Or possible documentation. Provided there's some way to slip away from here.
Obviously, don't get caught doing this.
But it's entirely possible you can get the intel you need without sneaking around. Let me know if you find anything out in any case.
Elly tosses you a small bag of eros.

EventText.NameOfScene: Report on your time working for Venefica.
theScene: I got a look at the back rooms.
Give Elly a raw candy ingredient.
Tell Elly about what was in the sign in book.
Tell Elly about Venefica's strange diary entry about the caverns...
I think I'm addicted to getting milked by her...

EventText.NameOfScene: I got a look at the back rooms.
theScene: Oh? Well, don't spare any details.

You nod and do your best to explain her work area, and the numerous self-stirring candy cauldrons filled with all kinds of bubbling liquids ranging from melted chocolate to caramel, as well as all the cupboards and assortment of alchemical, cooking, and magical utensils. There's also her room which she didn't include in the tour.

Briefly you mention the closet that held an almost countless number of different ingredients, as well as the her large garden in the back where she grows ingredients, and also mention Venefica's side note where she gets eggs shipped in by harpies.
Elly nods along all the while, soaking in every detail, perking up slightly as you go on to explain Venefica's basement and 'pet-cell', where you were milked.

Interesting... Also very concerning she has that all in her basement. But she let you go afterwards at the very least... Be sure to keep yourself in check and to not work there too often, it could have detrimental effects on your mentality.

But do let me know if you get a better look at her workshop, her garden, or even her room. Maybe even the front counter while she's not there if you can. But even this overview of her confectionary's layout, and the basement, are very informative.
I won't need any of the details of your 'milkings' as those are fairly straight forward in what they entail.
Report on your time working for Venefica.
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.
And if you somehow vanish, I'll be sure to look into Venefica's basement as a potential location.
Report on your time working for Venefica.

EventText.NameOfScene: Tell Elly about what was in the sign in book.
theScene: You explain to Elly what you discovered inside the book, which entailed personal information of customers, cute doodles, her general distrust of Elly, and the general lack of any actually useful information...
So it was actually just a sign in book...
D-Did I really leave that bad of an impression? ...I-I suppose with what I'm getting you to do I can't exactly {i}blame{/i} her, but-
The important thing is, whatever she's up to, if anything, isn't in that book...
...I'm starting to think I might just be chasing after shadows now...
But we can't let that deter us yet! We need to make very sure about all this, and this is just a very small part in that, even if it seems to show no ill will on her part.
What I mean is... something still seems off to me. So keep at it.
Report on your time working for Venefica.
Speaking of keeping at it... Great work [ThePlayerName].
Elly tosses you a pouch of eros.
So did you happen across anything else?
Report on your time working for Venefica.

EventText.NameOfScene: Tell Elly about Venefica's strange diary entry about the caverns...
theScene: You tell Elly everything you can from the diary entry you found in Venefica's room about her visit to the caverns within the mountain.
And the further you get into the tale the more serious Elly gets, especially when you mention the 'attack' on Venefica, even more so on the witch's own findings on the after effects.
There's a heavy silence for a few moments as Elly digests the story you're telling.
That... Shouldn't have been {i}possible{/i}... Controlling ambient demonic energy like {i}that{/i} to such an extent... It's unnatural...

And Venefica is most certainly not the type of person to idly write such a story in her diary... Additionally, this would explain why I've seen her head towards the mountain caverns... I initially figured it may have been for some malicious purpose, or perhaps ingredients... Which may still be part of the case.

But not only that, it somehow left a mark on her {i}soul{/i}, and as she's a monster girl, well witch, that makes- almost no sense either! The repair to the location being blasted makes sense, there have been known cases of the enchantment fixing locations, and even ambient demonic energy repairing damage... Although this is on a rather heavy scale.
I recall a magical surge that was likely this event, though at the time I had no idea what it was... But if it affected Venefica- Even with her guard down- This is a cause for great concern...

Hm- This- Potentially changes everything actually- Some of her more suspicious behavior could be linked to this- And I {i}doubt{/i} she would keep a fake diary just to mess with us. So- With everything I know so far- I think I might need to look into a different approach for when we confront her about all this...

Whoever managed to pull this off- Was likely trying to... subsume her soul? or- {i}something{/i} like that... And they're likely going to try it again on her. Or possibly {i}others{/i}. Which by all logic- Is very, very bad.

So- Venefica is- {i}likely{/i}, entirely innocent in all of my initial suspicions... Even with her strange candy shop and her status as a witch. They're completely unrelated to some of the other behavior I noticed from her with this information- and given her nature- there's no way she would ever tell me about it- especially not with uh- how prying I was...
Elly lets out deep sigh, and recomposes with a serious look, her glasses gleaming.

Alright! I still need you to get as much evidence and samples as you possibly can- Using them I should be able to glean more information about all this- and potentially develop some kind of counter measures to whatever happened. Or at least to Venefica in case she tries to blow us up or something!

This situation may be more dire than I initially expected, in a {i}totally{/i} different way that I would have ever thought, but I'm sure we can get to the bottom of this issue! Strange impossibilities or not.

And once this is all sorted out- I'm sure I can come up with a proper apology to her for having you violate her personal privacy. And hopefully she doesn't have some evil scheme we haven't found yet on top of whatever this is.
Report on your time working for Venefica.
Elly tosses you a sack of eros.

This should hopefully cover some of the expenses. Kind of bleeding my funds dry with all of these report payments, but this one was clearly important. Be sure to use it to further the mission, or buy some gear.
Report on your time working for Venefica.

EventText.NameOfScene: I think I'm addicted to getting milked by her...
theScene: Elly stares at you for a moment with a dead serious glare.
I'm pretty sure I {i}warned{/i} you that could happen. Getting drained like that is bound to develop some effects if done consistently.
But even so, this {i}does{/i} help further the investigation given the effect this had on you... So despite the possible long term ramifications of this, it may work out in our favor.

And I'm sure {i}someone{/i} else will be willing to milk you like she does as well. So you certainly have plenty of outlets for this 'addiction' of yours, not just Venefica. So don't worry too much about becoming her pet permanently.
The mere thought of that makes your cock twitch...
Report on your time working for Venefica.

Try to keep it together though, this investigation seems to be progressing well thanks to you. Once it's all said and done we might also be able to figure out a cure for your newfound issue.
Report on your time working for Venefica.

theScene: Oh? You have some raw ingredients for me to check?

theScene: Give her a Cup of Raw 'Demon' Sugar.
Give her the Flower and Fruit Samples.
Give her the Raw Candy Ingredient Samples.
Give her the Assorted Cocoa Beans.
Ask about Elly's findings on the samples.

EventText.NameOfScene: Hand her the Unmarked Chocolate Bar.
theScene: Elly takes the unmarked bar with an analytical gleam in her eyes.
Elly takes the unmarked bar with an analytical gleam in her eyes, and you tell her that you found it in a locked drawer.
But, seeing as you have it here and now, it can't hurt to find out for ourselves!
Really?! Then this could very well be the thing to blow this case wide open! It's likely a kind of experimental bar she's been working on to perfect before unleashing it to the unsuspecting masses!
Elly then, with the utmost care unwraps the packaging on the bar and carefully looks it over.
Hmmm. It looks normal enough... But eating something like this to test, is far too risky, but I'm sure my analysis spell should tell me everything I need to know!

Elly set the bar carefully down on the table, and raises one hand in front of it, her palm glowing blue as it projects small lines of magic that trail over the bar while she deeply thinks on the information she's getting.
Hmmm... Let me see here... Cocoa, Venefica's demonic energy, sugar fr- oh- and the milk is- I- {i}Oh-{/i} and- Oh dear-
O-Okay! This is not at {i}all{/i} what I was expecting!
You just give Elly a look of confusion while she cuts off her spell and works to recomposes herself.
Okay- Well... This has been- {i}Insightful.{/i} However- This- was not the breakthrough I expected or hoped for.
You continue to stare at Elly, waiting for an explanation while she starts to carefully re-wrap the chocolate bar.
She may already realize this is gone- So you will need to return it- Either without her notice- Or be honest and just hand it back to her.
Although you could likely eat it and she would- OKAY NO YOU SHOULD NOT DO THAT. Or at the very least please don't tell me about that!
Elly, can you slow down, and explain the chocolate bar.
Uhm, well- It's fairly 'normal'... However- Well- The ingredients are- {i}primarily{/i}-
She lets out a deep sigh in preparation for whatever it is she has to say.

While the chocolate bar is simple, the cocoa beans are clearly normal, but there are ingredients from Venefica's body, the sugar is produced from her sweat, the milk from her breasts, traces of her saliva, and uh-er- juices from her pussy mixed in.

As none of her other confections have had this sort of composition, I can only presume, that she made this as an experiment, either for her store, or to give to someone important to her, or something to give out as a sign of affection should the need arise.
So. I urge you to please return this to her, and to come up with an apology if possible.
She pushes the bar back to you with a calm look on her face.
She then lets out a tired sigh, and hands you a small pouch of Eros as well.
That is for your efforts in acquiring this 'unique' chocolate bar. As to a degree, it has been informative. Now let us never speak of it again.
Soooo, do you have anything else to report back on?

EventText.NameOfScene: AlternateBarOutro
theScene: She then lets out a tired sigh, fully recomposed.
Now let us never speak of this again, and please head about your business as normal...
Or do you have something else you need to discuss with me?

This is quite the variety she has...
Good job getting these, I'll be sure to thoroughly analyze this later. But I think I'll need more of the raw ingredients before I can come to any kind of proper conclusion...
She then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Here is the payment for this sample, I hope you can acquire other samples too.
So, do you have anything else to report back on?

These must have been risky to get... I'm sure they will be useful to the investigation though.
Excellent, I'll be sure to thoroughly analyze this later. But I think I'll need more of the raw ingredients before I can come to any kind of proper conclusion...

Here is the payment for this sample, I'm sure I'll be able to figure something out from it.

Well done, I'll be sure to thoroughly analyze this later. But I think I'll need more of the raw ingredients before I can come to any kind of proper conclusion...

EventText.NameOfScene: Ask about Elly's findings on the samples.
theScene: Ah yes, I'm glad you asked, after thorough testing and experimentation on the raw ingredients you collected-
That there is {i}nothing{/i} wrong or 'evil' with any of her ingredients...

Putting aside the element of common demonic energy commonly found in some of the ingredients that she likely uses for specific treats at least... But there's certainly nothing harmful with them innately...
Which is... odd to say the least, given some of the other findings I've had on her confections... So whatever it is, it's not her ingredients...
So while it may seem like there's no reason to be doing what we are, these samples were incredibly insightful! And I assure you something is still amiss here!
Elly then lets out a tired sigh and looks off to the side with a muddled expression.
I just need to figure out what {i}is{/i} going on...
She then hands you a pouch of Eros.
Consider this a bonus for your efforts in collecting all those samples.

theScene: She really likes toying with me sexually if I show weakness.
She uh, got me hooked on findom.

EventText.NameOfScene: She really likes toying with me sexually if I show weakness.
theScene: You then go on to describe how after verbally teasing you, she pressed her leg into your groin, her breasts against your chest, and continued teasing, coddling, and seducing you, wrapping you around her finger before using her magic to force you to stay on the brink of orgasm.

Additionally, Venefica is much more predatory and assertive in her desires than her cold demeanor displays. It's possible that you could use your weakness to your advantage to get in her good graces.
So overall this has been quite informative. If this ends up all just me being paranoid, I'm sure the two of you will get along quite well.

Elly sighs deeply at that response.
Alright. True. I just figured it may also be a better incentive for you to keep working. ...As an aside this could explain one of her nicknames as 'Fortunes Demise'...
But be sure to stay on track despite your newfound sexual fixation. Keep in mind she could still be a great danger to us all.
Also! This actually is fairly useful intel! At least on her behaviors. So be sure to keep it up. Despite how hard it must be by now to keep going.
